game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **귀곡팔황 (Guigubahuang):** This open-world Xianxia RPG features a player character who cultivates spiritual power to grow stronger, navigating a vast map by tapping to move or using a virtual joystick, and interacting with NPCs and objects via context-sensitive taps. Progression involves advancing through distinct cultivation stages (e.g., Qi Condensation, Foundation Establishment), each requiring specific resource collection and successful completion of mini-game challenges to break through. Combat is real-time, where players tap ability icons on a hotbar to unleash skills against various "요수" (demonic beasts) and rival cultivators, with damage output determined by learned "공법" (cultivation techniques) and equipped gear. Players can manage a sect, completing missions as a disciple, assigning tasks as an elder, or defending resource nodes as a sect leader, while also crafting "연단" (potions) and "부적" (talismans) from gathered materials. The game features three unique "삼대신기" (Divine Artifacts) chosen at the start, offering powerful abilities like reviving allies or taming bosses, with the ultimate goal being to achieve immortality, unify the "팔황" (Eight Desolations), or defeat powerful "신선" (immortals).
game_info.description: Embark on a cultivation journey in the mystical world of the Eight Desolations. You are a cultivator seeking immortality by gathering spiritual energy (Qi), advancing through cultivation stages, and defeating demonic beasts. Collect Qi orbs scattered across the realm, complete cultivation breakthroughs by reaching stage requirements, and battle enemies using your learned techniques. Choose your path wisely—will you achieve Foundation Establishment and beyond, or fall to the dangers that lurk in this Xianxia world?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your character in four directions
Space: Attack nearby enemies with your cultivation technique
Z: Use special ability (Spirit Burst - area damage, consumes Qi)
Enter: Start the game from the start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and collection test. Validates that the player can move around the map and collect Qi orbs without errors. Tests basic game mechanics and state updates.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly across the map while prioritizing movement toward visible Qi orbs. Collect orbs to increase Qi and verify score updates properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions, collects Qi orbs, and the gameState updates correctly with increased Qi count and score. No crashes or errors occur during extended play.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. This validates the complete game progression from start to achieving immortality. Tests cultivation breakthrough mechanics, combat system, and final victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Efficiently collect Qi orbs to advance through cultivation stages. Engage enemies strategically using basic attacks and special abilities. Progress through all cultivation stages (Qi Condensation → Foundation Establishment → Golden Core → Nascent Soul → Immortal) to achieve victory.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player successfully advances through all five cultivation stages by meeting Qi requirements, defeats enemies along the way, and reaches the GAME_OVER_WIN state upon achieving Immortality. The game displays the victory screen with final stats.
